records.ety: [F. magnat, L. (pl.) magnates, magnati, fr. magnus great. See Master.]

defs: A person of rank; a noble or grandee; a person of influence or distinction in any sphere; -- used mostly of prominent business executives; as, an industrial magnate.
One of the nobility, or certain high officers of state belonging to the noble estate in the national representation of Hungary, and formerly of Poland.
